/data/data/com.termux/files/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -Xlinker --dependency-file=CMakeFiles/llama-diffusion-cli.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/llama-diffusion-cli.dir/diffusion-cli.cpp.o" -o ../../bin/llama-diffusion-cli  -Wl,-rpath,/data/data/com.termux/files/home/build-gpu-adreno/bin: libllama-diffusion.a ../../bin/libllama-common.so.0.0.9190 -lpthread ../../bin/libllama.so.0.0.9190 ../../bin/libggml.so.0.12.0 ../../bin/libggml-cpu.so.0.12.0 ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.12.0 ../../common/libllama-common-base.a -lpthread
